articles.content:

articles.title: The MacBook Neo is ‘the most repairable MacBook’ in years, according to iFixit - TechCrunch
articles.description: Apple’s new MacBook Neo isn’t just the most affordable MacBook — it’s also the company's most repairable laptop in “about fourteen years."
articles.content:
Apples new MacBook Neo isnt just the most affordable MacBook by far its also the most repairable MacBook in about fourteen years, according to an in-depth teardown by the how-to website iFixit.
